story.intro.1: Achmet, the legendary Döner master, has vanished!
story.intro.2: All that's left is a half-eaten dürüm and a note…
story.intro.3: "Help! The Giant Dürüm rolled me up!"
story.intro.4: %s sets out through three crazy worlds to save his father.
story.win.2: %s unrolls the fladenbread and frees Achmet!
story.win.3: The family hugs and shares a well-earned döner.

sign.sauce: Mind the sauce — it bites back!
sign.bazaar: Flying carpets — please hold on tight!
